campaign.

This grassroots team has always stepped up when my team and I need your
support the most, and the response to emails like this one has always been
incredible. So today, I’m asking:

name: =?utf-8?Q?=E2=9C=85Elect_Abigail_Spanberger?=
subject: Today -- especially today -- this request is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is finally here!
| | Good morning, Peter!

It's March 31st and our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is finally here! We know that we can reach our goal before midnight tonight, but we need help to do it!

Here is why this race matters and why we are asking for your support:
1. **Abigail 's seat is a "Toss Up".** We worked tirelessly to move this district from the "Solid Republican" seat it was when Abigail got in the race to the "Toss Up" it is today. As a candidate, a "Toss Up" race means you can win; as an incumbent, a "Toss Up" means your opponent thinks they can win, and we expect they will put everything they have into beating Abigail.
2. Abigail is one of the most vulnerable new members of Congress in the nation, and a top target of the Republican party, if they want to win back the majority.
3. The National Republican Campaign Committee is already spending money on Facebook ads to attack Abigail.
4. The right-wing SuperPAC "Club For Growth" is already eyeing candidates to prop up against Abigail, and their VP of Campaigns said the following of VA-07, "we will invest more money there than any House race in the history of the club." Given Abigail's vocal stance on campaign finance and good governance reforms, it is fair to expect that Dark Money groups will spend millions on TV commercials attacking Abigail in 2020, just as they did in 2018.

One of the best ways that we can discourage Washington insiders from attacking Abigail's record of being an engaged legislator who fights for working families and represents everyone in her district, is to prove that we have a strong enough operation to fight back.

[**We want to prove that our grassroots momentum hasn 't slowed down since last Election Day, so we're hoping to receive three contributions from your area tonight. Will you help us out by chipping in any amount this morning? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gikLh91PY42kdPp4zOUDsSg5FkVKQdlCfHTTwK9pijQ=/1hz4AjAGmhRjXdFKCSvaicDQRH2QK_c0ZvkRMtqlP1s=?refcode=em_fr_2019.03.31_b1_ts_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800) | Date: March 31st, 2019
Deadline: 11:59 PM
**Contribution goal from your area: 3**
---

[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/gikLh91PY42kdPp4zOUDsSg5FkVKQdlCfHTTwK9pijQ=/1hz4AjAGmhRjXdFKCSvaicDQRH2QK_c0ZvkRMtqlP1s=?refcode=em_fr_2019.03.31_b1_ts_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)
---
We can do this with your help, team!

_Team Spanberger_
| Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/gikLh91PY42kdPp4zOUDsSg5FkVKQdlCfHTTwK9pijQ=/Ky_ClUqpiCG0YwRk8u4cQgLQlVXP_5YuNLBDOQBr8h4=)

If you'd only like to receive our most important email updates, you may [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/gikLh91PY42kdPp4zOUDsSg5FkVKQdlCfHTTwK9pijQ=/lCO1tcJOcrruRxyrkzwImbYaKEgik0TjqnsIpbvZqu8=) to request fewer emails from Abigail's campaign.

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/gikLh91PY42kdPp4zOUDsSg5FkVKQdlCfHTTwK9pijQ=/QwS60GJcP0k_exxEPjDr1vYT1PASIlKC5uDx9l3X1yQ=).

Glen Allen, VA 23058

name: Ro Khanna
subject: The DCCC is trying to keep people like me out of Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
There is a dangerous new policy designed to keep progressives out of Congress.
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a554/bed43eb/9ac559e3/75fb3aef/820034829/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
Friends,
There is a dangerous new policy designed to keep progressives out of Congress. The worst part? It's coming from within the Democratic Party.
Cheri Bustos, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee's chair for the 2020 election, just enacted a policy to blacklist anyone who works with candidates like me who will challenge an incumbent Democratic to win a seat in Congress. This new plan will strongarm progressive primary challengers out of running for office.
[**Tell DCCC Chair Cheri Bustos that this anti-democratic policy sends the wrong message to voters across the country. It's designed to protect the Washington establishment and runs contrary to everything the Democratic Party should be fighting for - representing working people.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a554/bed43eb/9ac559e3/75fb3aee/820034829/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/dccc-primary-blacklist?source=em190331-smo")
If the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee had its way, I wouldn't be in Congress today. Neither would members like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Talib, Ilhan Omar or any other Democrat who had the guts to take on the party establishment and fight for the working people of their district. **If we're being honest, this is the kind of policy protecting the Washington establishment that plays directly into Trump's hands - which is why we need you to speak up and strongly reject it.**
Voters are sick of the status quo, and this slap in the face to grassroots candidates needs to be met by all of us raising our voices and demanding the DCCC reverse this tone-deaf policy. The good news is that we have a strong Congressional Progressive Caucus that is fighting to open up the Democratic Party, but change isn't going to happen if it's just us working from the inside. The DCCC needs to hear your voice too.
[**Sign the petition telling Cheri Bustos to stop protecting the Washington establishment and let grassroots candidates fight for working people without the fear of backlash. Anything less is a betrayal of our democratic values.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a554/bed43eb/9ac559e3/75fb3aee/820034829/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/dccc-primary-blacklist?source=em190331-smo")
We cannot allow these divisive tactics when we need to be building a unified progressive movement that can bring the political revolution our country so desperately needs. Thank you for taking action.
In solidarity,
Ro Khanna
Member of Congress (CA-17)
**[SIGN THE PETITION»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a554/bed43eb/9ac559e3/75fb3aee/820034829/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/dccc-primary-blacklist?source=em190331-smo")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a554/bed43eb/9ac559e3/75fb3ae9/820034829/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a554/bed43eb/9ac559e3/75fb3ae8/820034829/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a554/bed43eb/9ac559e3/75fb3aeb/820034829/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a554/bed43eb/9ac559e3/75fb3aea/820034829/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=910%2E150750%2EiiVFBu)
Sisters and Brothers -
Today is an important day for our campaign. In just a few hours, we’ll close the books on our first Federal Election Commission fundraising deadline of the campaign.
We’re still short of hitting our goal of 1 million individual online contributions before midnight tonight. But if I can count on you to make a contribution to our campaign right now, we’ll have a chance to get there. You can use this link:
**[https://act.berniesanders.com/go/fec_deadline](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10226?refcode=em190331-1-120&t=2&akid=910%2E150750%2EiiVFBu)**
We have a chance to send an unmistakable message about the size and strength of our campaign to the corporate media, the billionaire class, and to the political establishment of this country. Let's make it happen.
Not me. Us.
Bernie Sanders

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe using this link**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=910%2E150750%2EiiVFBu). subject: Our last email today, we promise.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
Thank you to everyone who has supported us in this end-of-quarter push, and thank you for indulging us by reading this one last email of the quarter.
| | Hello Peter -- We hope you've enjoyed your weekend. Our whole team appreciates your support. Thank you to everyone who has supported us in this end-of-quarter push, and thank you for indulging us by reading this one last email of the quarter.

This is the last email that we'll send you tonight about our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. **We 're thankful for the response from supporters like you.** There are just a few hours left before we close the books on our March fundraising, and we still have just a bit further to go before we reach our goal.
